_doc: Conspiracy: Take the Crown (CN2) booster recipe. Generated by scripts/gen-booster-contents.mjs from data/_collation-facts/cn2.json (source: The Collation Project, lethe.xyz/mtg/collation). Edit the facts file and regenerate; do not hand-edit this file unless you also remove its facts source. Set composition: 80C / 60U / 42R / 12M. Collation: sequential, A/B/C1/C2 common runs. Occasional foil (1:67) modelled by folding foil odds into one common slot. Notes: Draft-matters supplemental set. Composition also includes 12 conspiracy cards and 15 cards with draft-related abilities (the draft-related cards are collated with the normal cards, unlike original Conspiracy). Kaya, Ghost Assassin has alternate foil art (222/221). Printed in USA. 36 packs per box.
